boundary: Direct public result URLs are visibility evidence; they are not treated as Google Search Console, Bing Webmaster, AI retrieval, or ranking proof.

queries.evidence: Public web search returned direct results for home, Evidence Map, Papers, and Chinese entry.
queries.evidence_needed_for_stronger_claim: Console export or dated URL-inspection receipt required before claiming console-side indexing.

queries.evidence: Public web search returned direct results for the HF mirror home, Press Kit, Systems, Technology, Evidence Map, and Papers.
queries.evidence_needed_for_stronger_claim: Dated direct result URLs or console evidence required for each new HF route.

queries.evidence: Public web search returned Papers with WisdomBench entries. The dedicated WisdomBench concept page was not separately confirmed in this check.
queries.evidence_needed_for_stronger_claim: Direct result URL for the WisdomBench concept page required before claiming exact concept-page discoverability.

queries.evidence: The exact public concept page is live and in sitemap/llms, but a direct exact-term search result for that route was not confirmed in this check.
queries.evidence_needed_for_stronger_claim: Direct exact-term result URL or console inspection receipt required.

queries.evidence: The exact public concept page is live and in sitemap/llms, but a direct exact-term search result for that route was not confirmed in this check.
queries.evidence_needed_for_stronger_claim: Direct exact-term result URL or console inspection receipt required.

queries.evidence: Public web search returned related project pages that mention Proof-Carrying Action; the dedicated concept route was not separately confirmed as a direct result.
queries.evidence_needed_for_stronger_claim: Direct result URL for the Proof-Carrying Action concept page required.

queries.evidence: The exact public concept page and P46 card are live and in sitemap/llms, but a direct exact-term search result for that route was not confirmed in this check.
queries.evidence_needed_for_stronger_claim: Direct result URL for the canon concept page or P46 card required.

queries.evidence: The P47 public card is live and in sitemap/llms, but a direct exact-term result for the card was not confirmed in this check.

queries.evidence: Public web search returned project routes and social posts referencing mianzhang.org. It also returned unrelated people named Mian Zhang, so branded queries should include Ouroboros Project, Wisdom Science, or MMJBDS.
queries.evidence_needed_for_stronger_claim: Console export or direct result URLs for target branded pages required before claiming broad branded-query coverage.
